SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT TODAY. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERNANDEZ, JONAS A FERNANDEZ, MARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONTIEL, DELIA ARRIGALE, CHRISTINE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
